articles.title: NH judge: Concord man violated Civil Rights Act in assault on transgender woman
articles.description:
The ruling stems from a 2024 assault at a Concord, New Hampshire, convenience store.

The post NH judge: Concord man violated Civil Rights Act in assault on transgender woman appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Concord man found guilty of violating Civil Rights Act in 2024 assault.
Assault occurred at a convenience store, highlighting safety concerns for transgender individuals.
Ruling may influence local policies on protecting LGBTQ+ rights in Boston.

articles.title: Red Sox’ trade deadline plans ‘fluid,’ ESPN’s Jeff Passan says
articles.description:
“Boston isn't discounting pursuing help before Aug. 3.”

The post Red Sox’ trade deadline plans ‘fluid,’ ESPN’s Jeff Passan says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox are considering trades before the August 3 deadline.
ESPN's Jeff Passan reports plans are currently fluid and evolving.
Potential trades could significantly affect team performance and local fan engagement.
